fields.name: Pyromancy
fields.description: Fire as substrate: flame called, shaped, worn, and loosed.

fields.name: Geomancy
fields.description: Earth as substrate: stone, metal, weight, and the patience of both.

fields.name: Cryomancy
fields.description: Cold as substrate: frost, ice, stillness, preservation.

fields.name: Stormcalling
fields.description: The sky's moods borrowed or bargained: lightning, gale, fog, unseasonable frost.

fields.name: Wildcraft
fields.description: Beasts and the hunt: beast-speech, pack-sense, the unlosable trail, the hunter's patience made supernatural.

fields.name: Flesh-Shaping
fields.description: The body as clay: shifting, toughening, growing claw and hide, mending flesh by remaking it.

fields.name: Hemomancy
fields.description: Blood as fuel and medium: read, moved, spent, hardened, stilled.

fields.name: Fury
fields.description: Rage as substrate: wrath fed into the body until the body is the weapon and the fury is the armor.

fields.name: Necromancy
fields.description: The craft of the dead and what lingers: laying, binding, warding, speaking-with — and unbinding the risen.

fields.name: Shadowcraft
fields.description: Shadow as substance and ally: concealment, the unseen angle, dread given form.

fields.name: Dominion
fields.description: Will bound by will: compulsion, silk-thin threads, puppetry, the mind laid open.

fields.name: Corruption
fields.description: Decay as transformation: venom, blight, witchfire, the seductive breaking of rigid forms.

fields.name: Glamour
fields.description: Seeming and misdirection: illusion, disguise, the stage that appears where none was.

fields.name: Resonant Chorus
fields.description: Magic amplified through voice, gesture, and presence: sound as force, song as ward, the crowd as instrument.

fields.name: Radiance
fields.description: Light as substrate: burning the abyssal, warding the dark, blessing, true healing.

fields.name: Glyphwork
fields.description: Magic encoded: inscribed formulae, spoken true names, sigils that hold force in patient reserve.

fields.name: Oathcraft
fields.description: Binding words: geasa, pacts, covenants, oaths that both parties feel holding.

fields.name: Mirrorwalking
fields.description: Step through an open mirror here and out of its twin elsewhere.

fields.name: Vanguard Vow
fields.description: Combat techniques granted by the Vanguard covenant vow.

fields.name: Bulwark Vow
fields.description: Combat techniques granted by the Bulwark covenant vow.

fields.name: Luminary Vow
fields.description: Combat techniques granted by the Luminary covenant vow.
